summary: Date-based Stock Verification feature fully tested. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: date picker, stamp selector, verification_date badges, and color-coded comparison table all working correctly. The feature allows executives to enter stock as of a specific verification date, and managers can see date-filtered book stock comparison with color coding (Red for decreased, Blue for increased, Green for within 20g).
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ ExecutiveStockEntry.jsx has date picker with data-testid='verification-date-input'
✓ POST /api/executive/stock-entry correctly accepts and stores verification_date field
✓ GET /api/manager/approval-details/{stamp} returns verification_date and date-filtered book stock
✓ ManagerApprovals.jsx shows 'Stock for: {date}' badges for entries
✓ Comparison header shows 'as of {verification_date}' to clarify date filter
✓ Color coding works: diffColor() returns green/blue/red based on threshold (20g)
✓ diffBg() applies background colors (bg-green-50, bg-blue-50, bg-red-50)
✓ My Entries shows verification_date badge for each entry
seed_data_creation: Stock entry created for STAMP 3 with verification_date 2026-02-21
context_for_next_testing_agent: Date-based stock verification feature is fully functional. Key flows: SEE1 enters stock via Stock Entry page (date picker + stamp selector) -> creates entry with verification_date -> Manager views in Approvals with date-filtered comparison -> color coding shows Green (<20g diff), Blue (increased), Red (decreased). The get_stamp_closing_stock(stamp, as_of_date) function in stock_service.py calculates opening_stock + transactions where date <= as_of_date.

Executive Stock Entry.Date picker: PASSED - data-testid='verification-date-input' present, defaults to today
Executive Stock Entry.Stamp selector: PASSED - data-testid='stamp-select' present with all stamps
Executive Stock Entry.My Entries badges: PASSED - Shows 'Stock for: {date}' verification date badge

Manager Approval Details.GET approval-details: PASSED - Returns verification_date and comparison array
Manager Approval Details.Book stock calculation: PASSED - Uses get_stamp_closing_stock() with as_of_date filter
Manager Approval Details.Verification date badge: PASSED - Shows 'Stock for: {date}' in entry cards

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/manager/approval-details/{stamp} - 200 OK (returns verification_date, date-filtered book stock)
GET /api/master-items - 200 OK (343 items including 17 in STAMP 3)

ExecutiveStockEntry.jsx.data-testid='my-entry-{stamp}': PRESENT - Entry cards with verification date badge
